name: Generate white-label PDF report in Iteration Layer

parameters.content:
## Generate a White-Label PDF Report

Agencies delivering reports under their clients' branding use this recipe to generate white-label PDF reports — with custom headers, color schemes, and content sections.

**Note:** This workflow uses the Iteration Layer community node (`n8n-nodes-iterationlayer`). Install it via Settings > Community Nodes before importing. Self-hosted n8n only.

### Step 1: Generate Report
Resource: **Document Generation**

Configure the Document Generation parameters below, then connect your credentials.
